tools.title: Spoki
tools.description: Italy's first WhatsApp conversational marketing platform. Automates marketing, sales, and customer support on WhatsApp using AI. Integrates with 4,000+ apps including e-commerce, CRM, and marketing software. Features AI chatbots with ChatGPT integration, bulk messaging, automation, scheduling, and WhatsApp CRM.
tools.use_case: WhatsApp marketing and customer support automation
tools.notes: Meta Tech Partner. No subscription - pay per use. 30-day money-back guarantee. Supports 50+ countries.

contact.location: San Vito dei Normanni, Puglia, Italy

tools.title: Expo
tools.description: Full-stack React Native framework. The only native framework recommended by Meta. Build Android, iOS, and web from a single codebase. 100+ production-ready libraries, EAS for CI/CD/builds, OTA updates. 80% of React Native developers choose Expo.
tools.notes: Trusted by thousands of enterprises. 50,000+ Discord members. 500,000+ projects created. Recommended by Meta.

tools.title: Verdent AI
tools.description: Autonomous AI coding agent. Multi-agent collaboration, Advanced Agent for complex work, leading model access, data analysis, rapid prototyping. Chat-first design, no bloat. Mac Apple Silicon native.
tools.notes: Mac Apple Silicon app. Limited-time free trial. 3,100+ LinkedIn followers.

tools.title: TestSprite
tools.description: AI end-to-end testing agent. Autonomous — writes tests, fixes bugs, validates software. No-code test refinement, zero-overhead automation, continuous regression guardrails. Featured by Andrej Karpathy and Boris Cherny (Claude Code).
tools.notes: 100,000+ community members. Endorsed by Andrej Karpathy & Boris Cherny. Product Hunt featured.

tools.title: OnSpace AI
tools.description: No-Code AI App Builder. Build iOS, Android & web apps from your phone. Agent mode, Stripe payments built-in, fully managed backend (database, auth, edge functions). Free to start, paid from $25/mo.
tools.use_case: Rapid no-code app prototyping and MVPs
tools.notes: 100,000+ creators. Built by SoulZ AI Inc. (Los Angeles).
